name: caraccidentclinicmiami
description: Tailwind CSS build for Car Accident Clinic Miami block theme

scripts.build: npm run copy-assets && npm run dump && tailwindcss -i ./assets/css/tailwind.src.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --minify
scripts.dev: npm run copy-assets && npm run dump && tailwindcss -i ./assets/css/tailwind.src.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --watch
